title: pandanus spiralis var. thermalis
intro: Pandanus spiralis var. thermalis, also known as the spiral screw palm, is a type of tropical plant native to the island of New Guinea. The leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pandanus spiralis var. thermalis include treating fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as being used as a natural remedy for wounds and cuts. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, teas, and topical applications, such as creams and ointments, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
